calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-15-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: C. Salceda.
Petitioner: Karen Vander Meulen, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Caelum Jakob Brown, was sworn and examined.
Order Dispensing Notice to Minor's Father, granted and signed in court.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Caelum Jakob Vander Meulen.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-23-2007 Reset To Feb-15-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Gina Gonzales, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Petitioner: Karen Vander Meulen, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Caeclum Jakob Brown, was sworn and examined.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent and/or proof of service, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor: Caeclum Jakob Brown is continued to Feb. 15, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to file an application and order dispensing with notice to the minor's father.
